response.original_title: 体育大伝統 添い寝当番vol.7
response.overview: At a sports university, freshmen are subjected to a peculiar tradition: the "sleep-together duty" with upperclassmen. What begins with shy hugs and touches on the back evolves into intimate discoveries that awaken unknown sensations. The young athletes — nervous, muscular, or timid — react with shivers, heavy breathing, and glances that mix shame and desire. Between blindfolds that sharpen the senses and caresses that reveal the body as an erogenous zone, the senior leads each freshman toward a surrender that challenges their very self-control. Even the most disciplined athlete loses composure under the pressure of experienced hands.
response.tagline: As expected, there's a hidden tradition of being embraced by gay old men in the shadow of glory!!
response.title: Sports University Tradition: Sleep-Together Duty Vol. 7
